theme: Five Mistakes That Sink Incentive Trips

linkedin.text: After 200+ events, here are the 5 mistakes that quietly wreck incentive trips: 🧩 1) Booking the destination before checking flight access — connections kill the vibe. 2) Underbudgeting transfers; ground logistics is where trips fall apart. 3) Cramming the agenda so "reward" feels like work. 4) Ignoring dietary, accessibility and visa needs until too late. 5) No single on-ground producer when something goes sideways — and it always does. Avoid these and you're 90% of the way to a trip people remember for the right reasons. ✅ Want a second set of eyes on your plan? Book a free review call — link in bio. #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #EventTips #B2BEvents #IncentiveTrip #EventProduction

image_prompt: High aerial of hundreds of incentive-trip guests boarding a fleet of coaches lined up along a sunlit Mediterranean harbour, tiny figures from above moving in orderly streams between vehicles, turquoise water and moored yachts along the quay. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
